name: Peanut Butter Cookies with Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and brown sugar with softened butter or margarine. Beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add peanut butter, vanilla, and egg; blend well.
4. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off.
5. Add flour, baking soda, and salt; mix well.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Using a fork dipped in sugar, flatten each ball into a crisscross pattern.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 6 to 9 minutes or until golden brown and set.
10. Remove from cookie sheets immediately.
Variations:
- Chocolate Peanut Butter Crunch Bars: Prepare dough as directed. Omit the additional 4 teaspoons of sugar. Stir in 1/2 cup crisp rice cereal into the dough. Press into an ungreased 15 x 10-inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12 to 17 minutes or until golden brown. Cool for 15 minutes. Meanwhile, melt 1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips and 1/2 cup peanut butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Stir in 1-1/2 cups crisp rice cereal. Spoon the mixture evenly over slightly cooled bars; gently spread. Cool completely. Cut into bars (48 bars).
- Giant Peanut Butter Candy Cookies: Prepare dough as directed. Stir in 1 cup candy-coated chocolate pieces. Using 1/4 cup of dough per cookie, place cookies 4 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Flatten to a 4-inch diameter. Omit the additional 4 teaspoons of sugar. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 8 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Cool for 1 minute; remove from cookie sheets.
- Oatmeal Peanut Butter Cookies: Prepare dough as directed, reducing flour to 3/4 cup and adding 3/4 cup rolled oats. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours for easier handling. Shape and flatten balls as directed. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 6 to 10 minutes or until golden brown.
- Peanut Butter and Jelly Thumbprints: Prepare dough and shape into balls as directed. Increase the additional sugar to 1/4 cup; roll the balls in sugar. Place 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Using your thumb, make a deep imprint in the center of each cookie. Bake as directed. Cool completely. Spoon 1/2 teaspoon of jelly, jam, or preserves into each imprint.
